_meta.description: MLB outfield wall distances at five reference points per park: LF foul line, LF-CF power alley (left-center gap), dead center, RF-CF power alley (right-center gap), RF foul line. All distances in feet. lfWallHt/rfWallHt included only for notably tall walls.
_meta.source: Web-verified 2025-26 configurations. Primary sources: Wikipedia ballpark articles, MLB.com official facts & figures pages, CBS Sports / ESPN / MLB.com press releases, Royals/Orioles/Tigers official announcements. Power alleys interpolated where unpublished (marked in notes).
_meta.notes: KC 2026 walls per Royals press release Jan 2026 (LF 347, alleys 379, CF 410, RF 344). BAL LF wall moved in for 2025 per Orioles announcement (373-374 range from prior 384). Dodger CF actual distance 400 ft though posted as 395 since 1973 — 400 used here. OAK uses Sutter Health Park Sacramento 2025; power alleys interpolated from Google Maps measurement published on social media (~375 LC, ~368 RC). ARI deep-alley markers at 413 are behind the posted 374 power alley signs; 374 used as standard power alley. CWS/STL/TOR power alleys sourced from MLB.com history pages and Wikipedia. SEA/TB right-center interpolated from published three-point data where five-point not found.

BAL.note: LF wall moved in for 2025 to ~373-374 ft from prior 384 ft (2022-24 config). Wikipedia 2025 config: LF straight-away 373, deep-LC 376, CF 400.

KC.note: 2026 dimensions per Royals Jan 2026 press release: LF pulled in 9 ft to 347, alleys in 10 ft to 379, CF unchanged at 410, RF pulled in 9 ft to 344. Wall height reduced from 10 to 8.5 ft.

LAD.note: CF posted as 395 on wall since 1973; actual surveyed distance is 400 ft.

OAK.note: Sutter Health Park, Sacramento. Official: LF 330, CF 403, RF 325. Alleys interpolated from Google Maps measurement (Jon Anderson / @JonPgh, Jan 2025): LC ~375, RC ~368.
